feed.title: sakkamade
feed.subtitle: through the life with yuri in heart

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.title: Episode 13. Defective Yuuyami.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Yuuyami never dreams. Autodoll are not dream. Upon system abend, everything’s vanish. Bubbles as though. Fun days, happy moments, each and everything. However, consciousness of Yuuyami certainly was yet there. Yuuyami have no concept for where is ‘there’. Insubstantial, drifting, a very, very tiny consciousness that appeared from the dark.

entry.title: Episode 12. All Alone.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Yuuyami collapsed backwards. Whereas her arms that were tightening Lydia, simultaneously set girl free. Following several violent coughs, Lydia sight grew blurred by tears. That scared her. Pained her. Made her believe she would break. However rather than aforesaid, bewildered, not understanding a grounds of Yuuyami’ conduct.

entry.title: Episode 11. Beach Shutdown.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Lydia was driving the bike toward south. Upon tandem seat was Yuuyami, with backpack behind. Being motorcycle maintain one hundred kilometres per hour, they expect to reach seashore in thirty minutes. Ultimately, rain continued six days straight. However, Lydia didn’t complain. As the reason, she was absorbed in project of building Maker Factory. The pair instructed ten toil AD to advance construction of Maker Factory, and departed library first thing in the morning. After sea viewing, they plan to return to library at noon, get through with lunch, and head to Rapha. Approximately twenty-five minutes after pair left library. They went beyond the area of forty kilometres radius, explored afore by Yuuyami. Familiar parched​ land gradually grew to blend with different colours. Under the bed of sky-blue, vibrates olive, pea green, white and deep peach colours. That was incredible paysage. Lydia slows down and stopped motorcycle.

entry.title: Episode 10. White Map.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Today it has been raining since the morning. However not mere potsu-potsu, but zaa-zaa.1 Looked forward to sea trip Lydia, now being crestfallen and sits upon the library floor. [Potsupotsu] - spots; here and there; [Zāzā]- raining heavily; side-comment: cute; back

entry.title: Episode 9. Thinking Time.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Upon returning to underground library, Lydia enter the air shower together with Yuuyami. Air shower is the room where dirt and bacteria that stuck to clothes and body can be completely removed. Being that in order to become absolutely clean just a single minute is sufficient, before world’s collapse it was widely popularized in general households. Pushed out by trend, traditional​ bath disappeared from ordinary houses. But, I’d like to reproduce the bath someday, wished Lydia. Ambience of bath, cleansing body with foam, seemed to be very fun.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.title: Episode 7. Angel Project.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Girl was enjoying afternoon teatime. Sitting upon a cheap chair under parasol, mere saucer occupies the table. Tea cup that supposed to be placed there as well, was now in her right hand. Girl elegantly spends her time, whereas viewing scenery of the fallen world. With the snow melt, that became her daily routine. Albeit weather as yet a little chilly, being that she needs a time to simply drink a single cup of tea, it doesn’t really bothered. Behind the girl rises a military AD, Type・Ohan. It’s the truth, nothing but stands. In case of problem not taking a place, Ohan do not talk. However,

entry.title: Episode 6. Commencement of Exploration.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Together with Yuuyami, Lydia demounted burnt motor from the motorcycle. After that, fatigued Lydia sat down and was dimly sitting for a while. Diagonally before Lydia sits Yuuyami.

entry.title: Episode 5. Path to the Gods.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Garage was complete in five days after Yuuyami joins. By Lydia’s suggestion, outer wall of the garage was painted a scarlet hue. However being that it was eerie all red, she crowded it with some white geometric pattern. What only led to increasing its creepiness. But, nah it’s okay, compromised Lydia. Floor tiled in white and black checkered pattern, whereupon were currently lying Lydia and Yuuyami. The tiles were chilly, and taking into account the current temperature it’s not possible to describe as very comfortable. I need to install air conditioner, thought Lydia.
